title: Butternut Squash Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan stew made with butternut squash and aromatic spices. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the butternut squash, cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the tomatoes, stock, and honey. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
